offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We streamline invoice generation instead of manual invoicing through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent invoicing leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking invoicing help
Indie Hackers discussions on invoicing workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share invoicing tools
try_it: Let users try customizable invoice templates and reporting for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual invoicing process
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
